ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck, SUV) */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "msrp" REAL /* Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price of the vehicle */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the vehicle */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the vehicle */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the vehicle (e.g., available, leased, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES vehicle_categories ("vehicle_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leasing_terms" (
  "leasing_term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leasing term */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with this leasing term */,
  "payment_period" INTEGER /* Payment period for this leasing term (e.g., 24 months) */,
  "monthly_payment" REAL /* Monthly payment amount for this leasing term */,
  "weekly_equivalent" REAL /* Weekly equivalent of the monthly payment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leasing term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leasing term */,
  "down_payment" REAL /* Down payment required for the leasing term */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the leasing term */,
  "residual_value" REAL /* Residual value of the vehicle at the end of the leasing term */,
  "early_termination_fee" REAL /* Fee for early termination of the leasing term */,
  "late_payment_fee" REAL /* Fee for late payments */,
  "mileage_limit" INTEGER /* Mileage limit for the leasing term */,
  "mileage_overage_fee" REAL /* Fee per mile over the mileage limit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leasing_term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leasing_terms_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "financial_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "leasing_term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leasing term associated with this financial data */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the leasing term */,
  "tax_relief" REAL /* Tax relief for the leasing term */,
  "total_after_tax_relief" REAL /* Total cost after tax relief */,
  "annual_cost" REAL /* Annual cost of the leasing term */,
  "total_payments" REAL /* Total payments made for the leasing term */,
  "remaining_balance" REAL /* Remaining balance on the leasing term */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applied to the leasing term */,
  "insurance_cost" REAL /* Insurance cost for the leasing term */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Maintenance cost for the leasing term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leasing_costs" (
  "leasing_cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leasing cost entry */,
  "leasing_term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leasing term associated with this leasing cost */,
  "leasing_cost" REAL /* Leasing cost for the leasing term */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of leasing cost (e.g., maintenance, insurance, administrative) */,
  "cost_date" TEXT /* Date when the cost was incurred */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leasing_cost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, leasing manager, financial analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_categories" (
  "vehicle_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle category (e.g., car, truck, SUV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leasing_status" (
  "leasing_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leasing status entry */,
  "leasing_term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leasing term associated with this leasing status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the leasing term (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leasing_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_schedules" (
  "payment_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment schedule entry */,
  "leasing_term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leasing term associated with this payment schedule */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for the leasing term (e.g., monthly, bi-weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leasing_history" (
  "leasing_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leasing history entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with this leasing history */,
  "leasing_term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leasing term associated with this leasing history */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leasing term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leasing term */,
  "total_mileage" INTEGER /* Total mileage at the end of the leasing term */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle at the end of the leasing term (e.g., excellent, good, fair, poor) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leasing_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leasing_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user who performed the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was read */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
